entries: **Summon Spirits — an animated companion in your menu bar**: a new "Summon Spirits" menu item toggles a small white silhouette that runs next to your usage percentages — a phoenix for Claude, a dragon for Codex. It animates faster the harder you burn tokens (idle -> paused, heavy -> sprinting), driven entirely by your local burn rate. Off by default; the on/off state is remembered. No network, like everything else.
**`usage export` command**: dump your usage totals to CSV straight from the terminal.
**CSV download in the HTML report**: the report's share dialog can now export the project/model breakdown as a CSV file (replacing the old copy-file-path action).
